# Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Data Plane - Actions API Reference

## Complete List of Supported Actions

The Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Data Plane API supports the following actions:

### Memory Management Actions
- **BatchCreateMemoryRecords** - Create multiple memory records in batch
- **BatchDeleteMemoryRecords** - Delete multiple memory records in batch
- **BatchUpdateMemoryRecords** - Update multiple memory records in batch
- **DeleteMemoryRecord** - Delete a single memory record
- **GetMemoryRecord** - Retrieve a specific memory record
- **ListMemoryRecords** - List all memory records
- **RetrieveMemoryRecords** - Retrieve memory records
- **StartMemoryExtractionJob** - Start a memory extraction job
- **ListMemoryExtractionJobs** - List memory extraction jobs

### Authentication & Token Actions
- **CompleteResourceTokenAuth** - Complete resource token authentication
- **GetResourceApiKey** - Get resource API key
- **GetResourceOauth2Token** - Get OAuth2 token for a resource
- **GetWorkloadAccessToken** - Get workload access token
- **GetWorkloadAccessTokenForJWT** - Get access token using JWT
- **GetWorkloadAccessTokenForUserId** - Get access token for a user ID

### Event Management Actions
- **CreateEvent** - Create an event
- **DeleteEvent** - Delete an event
- **GetEvent** - Retrieve a specific event
- **ListEvents** - List all events

### Browser Session Actions
- **StartBrowserSession** - Start a browser session
- **StopBrowserSession** - Stop a browser session
- **GetBrowserSession** - Get browser session details
- **ListBrowserSessions** - List all browser sessions
- **SaveBrowserSessionProfile** - Save browser session profile
- **UpdateBrowserStream** - Update browser stream

### Code Interpreter Actions
- **StartCodeInterpreterSession** - Start a code interpreter session
- **StopCodeInterpreterSession** - Stop a code interpreter session
- **GetCodeInterpreterSession** - Get code interpreter session details
- **ListCodeInterpreterSessions** - List all code interpreter sessions
- **InvokeCodeInterpreter** - Invoke code interpreter

### Runtime & General Actions
- **InvokeAgentRuntime** - Invoke the agent runtime
- **InvokeAgentRuntimeCommand** - Invoke agent runtime commands
- **Evaluate** - Evaluate an expression or condition
- **GetAgentCard** - Get agent card information
- **ListActors** - List actors
- **ListSessions** - List all sessions
- **StopRuntimeSession** - Stop a runtime session

## Documentation Structure
- **Breadcrumb Navigation**: AWS > Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Data Plane > API Reference > Actions
- **PDF Available**: Full API reference available as PDF download
- **Base Documentation URL**: `https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/APIReference`

Note: No specific dates or changelog entries were visible on this page.
